description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On July 16, 2025 at 10:39 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Redwood City, California was in a collision 
involving a curb in a parking lot at 2485 El Camino Real.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southeastbound in a parking lot off of El Camino Real. After coming to a stop at a stop sign, the Waymo AV 
began to turn right into an aisle in the parking lot when it drove over a curb and the underside of the Waymo AV made contact with the 
curb. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was not engaged and a test driver was operating the Waymo AV in manual 
mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
